{{Quote|It's lamentable when the only answer we can find lies in the creation of an army. I had hoped that we, as a new generation of lawmakers and leaders, could find a better alternative. We probably would have won if Trevor wasn't sick with nerf-pox.|Dashé Borreno|<ref name="Hnn" />}}
'''Dashé Borreno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] from the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], born around [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]]. A noted political prodigy, Borreno was a member of the [[Legislative Youth Program/Legends|Legislative Youth Program]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Borreno and her fellow trainees traveled to [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna City]], for a mock vote on the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]]. She opposed the vote, but her side lost by 52 to 48 percent. Borreno lamented the state of [[Politics/Legends|political]] thinking among her peers, as well as the fact that the [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Legislative Youth Program/Legends|Youth Program]] member, [[Trevor Insevade]], was absent from the vote due to becoming ill from [[nerf-pox]].<ref name="Hnn" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dashé Borreno first appeared in the ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'' article ''Legislative Youth Program Role-Plays Vote''. It was released on the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] website in [[2002]].<ref name="Hnn" />
